name_en: ❤️ B-style exquisite 'Title - Taylor Handbag', crafted with glossy two-tone leather and vintage plaid fabric, finished with exquisite three-button rivets. Can be carried by the top handle or worn on the shoulder with a detachable strap. 🎁 26 x 13.5 x 20cm
